items.title: Why GE Vernova, PG&E and Mastercard Are Income Boosters for 2026
items.description: Dividend increases of 100% are the latest reward for shareholders in GEV and PCG. Meanwhile, Mastercard's latest increase comes in well above 10%.

items.title: PayPal Stock Trades Below Industry P/E: How to Play the Stock?
items.description: PYPL trades below its industry's average P/E as earnings estimates rise, shares decline, partnerships expand and Venmo grows.

items.title: Where To Find Outperformance In 2026
items.description: I expect real estate, financials, and energy sectors to outperform in 2026 as prior underperformance and macro tailwinds set up favorable risk/reward.

items.title: Latest News In Digital Payment - AI Transforming E-Commerce Across Asia-Pacific Markets
items.description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is playing a transformative role in digital payments and e-commerce in the Asia-Pacific region, with notable advancements in China, India, and Southeast Asia. These emerging markets are experiencing rapid AI adoption, enhancing efficiencies in consumer interactions and platform operations. Despite these gains, challenges remain, including issues related to workforce skills, data governance, and infrastructure limitations. The impact is varied across the region,...

items.title: Visa, CRH And More: CNBC's 'Final Trades'
items.description: On CNBC's Halftime Report Final Trades, Kevin Simpson touted Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) for its strong free cash flow and clean balance sheet.
